problem_text: Check if 847123 is prime. If so, answer with 1, otherwise answer with the smallest factor greater than 1.
notes: 847123 = 263 * 3221 (both prime). sqrt(847123) ~ 920. Model must trial-divide by the first 56 primes to find 263. Significantly harder than easy (7547, 23 primes) but easier than hard (3486247, 108 primes).
